description: Letter from Mevasser b. David (Tinnis) to Nahray b. Nissim (Fustat), ca. 1052. Mevasser b. David appears to have recently arrived from the Maghreb (al-Mahdiya). The letter is largely about sending and receiving correspondence. The writer congratulates Nahray b. Nissim on the latter’s marriage. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, p. 292.)
description_he: מכתב מ-Tinnīs לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
